name: Grilled Tuna and Cheese Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Starkist Chunk White Tuna, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread one side of each slice of bread with butter.
2. Top three bread slices with cheese, tuna, and second bread slice.
3. Grill 1 to 2 minutes per side until lightly browned. Makes 3 sandwiches.
